<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Terminate a deal"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/deals/{id}/terminate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Transitions a confirmed deal to TERMINATED status.
